p2p_enrich.notes: ENVRIONMENT ISSUE: Node.js is not installed in the Docker image, but all existing tests require it (they run subprocess.run(['node', '--experimental-strip-types', ...]) to execute TypeScript code). No p2p tests were added because the base environment lacks required tooling. TO FIX: Add Node.js to the Dockerfile (e.g., 'RUN apt-get install -y nodejs npm' or use nodesource setup). Once Node.js is available, add these p2p tests to test_outputs.py: test_repo_typescript_syntax (validates syntax of modified files), test_repo_typescript_types_basic (runs tsc --noEmit on scripts/build), test_repo_build_script_runnable (validates build.ts syntax). Corresponding eval_manifest.yaml entries needed with type=pass_to_pass and origin=repo_tests. Repo: oven-sh/bun at commit 485ec522a22b469b336aece8276b507a71665a87.

validate.notes: Fixed Dockerfile to add Node.js 24.x. Fixed test_outputs.py JavaScript escaping. All 7 tests pass.
